title: Reading Comprehension — Easy — Grade 3-4 — Food & Family
subject: tieng-anh
instructions_vi: Read each passage carefully and answer the questions below.

sections.title: I. Read the passage and choose the best word to fill in each blank.

passage.raw_text: My family loves cooking together at home. Every Sunday, my mother (0) prepares a big meal for all of us. She always buys fresh (1) _____ from the market early in the morning. My father likes to (2) _____ the vegetables while my sister sets the table. We always (3) _____ together and talk about our week. Sharing a meal makes our family feel (4) _____ and close.

text_segments.text: together at home. Every Sunday, my mother
a big meal for all of us. She always buys fresh (1) _____ from the
early in the morning. My father likes to (2) _____ the
while my sister sets the table. We always (3) _____ together and talk about our week. Sharing a meal makes our family feel (4) _____ and close.

questions.context: She always buys fresh (1) _____ from the market early in the morning.
questions.explanation_vi: 'Ingredients' nghĩa là nguyên liệu nấu ăn — mẹ mua nguyên liệu tươi ở chợ vào buổi sáng.

questions.context: My father likes to (2) _____ the vegetables.
questions.explanation_vi: 'Chop' nghĩa là cắt, thái — bố thái rau củ để chuẩn bị nấu ăn.

questions.context: We always (3) _____ together and talk about our week.
questions.explanation_vi: 'Eat together' nghĩa là ăn cùng nhau — cả nhà cùng ăn và trò chuyện.

questions.context: Sharing a meal makes our family feel (4) _____ and close.
questions.explanation_vi: 'Warm' (ấm áp) — bữa ăn gia đình mang lại cảm giác gắn kết và ấm áp.

sections.title: II. Read the passage and answer the questions.

passage.raw_text: Rice is the most important food in Vietnam. People eat rice for breakfast, lunch, and dinner. Farmers grow rice in green fields called rice paddies. The work is very hard and takes many months. After harvesting, the rice is dried in the sun before it is sold. Vietnamese people also use rice to make many other dishes, such as rice noodles, rice cakes, and rice porridge. These dishes are popular all over the country and are a big part of Vietnamese culture.

text_segments.text: Rice is the most important food in Vietnam. People eat rice for breakfast, lunch, and dinner.
grow rice in green fields called
. The work is very hard and takes many months. After
, the rice is dried in the sun before it is sold. Vietnamese people also use rice to make many other
, such as rice noodles, rice cakes, and rice porridge. These dishes are popular all over the country and are a big part of Vietnamese culture.

questions.prompt: Vietnamese people only eat rice at dinner time.
questions.explanation_vi: Bài viết 'People eat rice for breakfast, lunch, and dinner' — người Việt ăn cơm cả ba bữa.

questions.prompt: Rice is grown in fields called rice paddies.
questions.explanation_vi: Bài viết 'Farmers grow rice in green fields called rice paddies' — đúng, lúa được trồng ở ruộng lúa.

questions.prompt: What happens to rice after it is harvested?
options: It is dried in the sun.
questions.correct: It is dried in the sun.
questions.explanation_vi: Bài viết 'the rice is dried in the sun before it is sold' — lúa được phơi nắng trước khi bán.

questions.prompt: Write ONE word from the passage that means 'cooked rice in liquid form'.
questions.explanation_vi: 'Porridge' nghĩa là cháo — cháo gạo là một trong các món ăn từ gạo được đề cập.
